laws.title: IInterface Compliance
laws.details: All 4 DevEx protocols (ISDKClient, ICLIRuntime, IDocGenerator, IAPISpecPublisher) implemented with matching signatures. DocPipeline stagetate Machine uses PipelineStage enum (7 states).

laws.title: Concretion Over Abstraction
laws.details: No abstract base classes in core/devex/. SDKClient, CLIRuntime, DocGenerator, APISpecPublisher, DocPipeline, DevExTraceCorrelator are all concrete classes.

laws.title: Deterministic Guards
laws.details: DocPipeline guards G-D1-G-D5 and G-R1-G-R5 are deterministic: same inputs -> same guard decision. DDG enforces SHA-256 content determinism.

laws.title: Observability via Events
laws.details: SDKClient publishes SDKConnected/JobSubmitted events. CLIRuntime publishes CLICommandExecuted events. DocGenerator publishes DocPublished events. APISpecPublisher publishes SpecPublished/SpecRolledBack events.

laws.title: Rollback Safety
laws.details: APISpecPublisher.rollback_spec restores exact previous spec version with hash-based version tracking and self-contained rollback.

laws.title: No Global Mutable State
laws.details: All DevEx components use instance-scoped state. DevExTraceCorrelator._traces is per-instance. DocPipeline._stage and _history are per-instance.

laws.title: devex_trace_id Propagation
laws.details: All public methods accept devex_trace_id. DevExTraceCorrelator generates 'dx_' + SHA-256(session_id + operation_type + timestamp_ns)[:24] format. Traces propagate through SDK->F1->EventBus->F4.

laws.title: Runtime Isolation (F1 only)
laws.details: SDKClient and CLIRuntime communicate exclusively through F1 UnifiedRuntime. strict_devex_mode enforces HTTPS endpoint. No direct ExecutionEngine access in any devex component.

laws.title: Immutable Core Execution
laws.details: Core execution paths remain unmodified. All devex components are additive layer on top of existing architecture.

laws.title: Performance Bounds
laws.details: DocPipeline guards complete in O(n) == number of inputs. DDG hashing is O(1) per operation size.

laws.title: Dynamic Guard Resolution
laws.details: DocPipeline guards are evaluated per-invocation. CLI routing guards G-R1-G-R5 resolve dynamically based on command, access_level, and trace_id.

laws.title: Deterministic Enforcement
laws.details: DDG fully enforces RULE 1 determinism. CLI guard evaluation is deterministic per input set.

laws.title: Canon Completeness
laws.details: All applicable laws (1-27) addressed in devex implementation with appropriate law annotations.

rules.title: Deterministic Documentation
rules.details: DDG: SHA-256(codegraph_input + api_spec_input + canon_version + template_version). Same inputs -> same content_hash. Verified by test_ddg_deterministic_same_inputs and test_full_pipeline_ddg_matches.

rules.title: Input Validation
rules.details: SDKClient validates all inputs (endpoint, auth_token, devex_trace_id) with _validate_not_none. DocGenerator validates output_format is supported. APISpecPublisher validates OpenAPI version.

rules.title: Guard Enforcement
rules.details: All 5 doc pipeline guards (G-D1-G-D5) and all 5 CLI routing guards (G-R1-G-R5) enforced. Pipeline blocks on any guard failure with specific blocked_by and reason.

rules.title: Trace Recording
rules.details: DevExTraceCorrelator used by all 6 devex components. Traces are non-empty, chain follows devex_trace_id hierarchy: SDK/CLI -> F1 -> EventBus -> F4.

rules.title: Rollback Self-Containment
rules.details: APISpecPublisher rollback affects only the _spec_history dict. No side effects on live specs. Rollback of unknown hash returns rolled_back=False without error.

stop_conditions.condition: LAW 13 isolation: no direct ExecutionEngine access
